title: rubus idaeus var. strigosus
intro: Rubus idaeus var. strigosus, also known as the American red raspberry, is a type of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to North America. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus idaeus var. strigosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to leverage its medicinal properties, and it is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products due to its sweet-tart flavor and high nutritional value.
